summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 55 - Advisor Command Center (10-Zone Layout). All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all 10 zones are present and functional. The new Advisor Command Center is the default landing page (/ redirects to /advisor-command-center) and displays the complete 10-zone layout for the 'world's best wealth management platform'.

issues: Compliance disclaimer modal appears on each page load - this is expected behavior for financial services compliance

critical_code_review_comments: 10-Zone Layout implemented correctly following best-in-class wealth management platform design
Zone 1 - Top Navigation: Global search, AI Copilot button, notifications with alert count
Zone 3 - Advisor Intelligence Feed: 4 alert types (portfolio drift, tax opps, retirement risks, idle cash)
Zone 4 - Key Metrics Row: AUM ($21.3M), Clients (164), Net Flows, Revenue, Risk Alerts
Zone 5 - Client Insights: Cross-client intelligence with severity badges
Zone 6 - Portfolio Alerts: Priority-based alerts with client names
Zone 7 - Tasks & Workflow: Action items with due dates and priority badges
Zone 8 - Market Intelligence: ASX 200, S&P 500, AUD/USD, 10Y Bond yields with change indicators
Zone 9 - AI Copilot: Quick query buttons and input field for custom queries
Zone 10 - Instant Client Meeting Prep: 8 client cards with one-click AI briefing generation
All APIs properly integrated with frontend - data flows correctly from backend to UI
seed_data_creation: None - uses mock data in command_center.py, intelligence.py, portfolio_monitoring.py, meeting_prep.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 implements the 10-zone Advisor Command Center as the new default landing page. Key APIs tested: GET /api/command-center/daily-digest (main data source), GET /api/monitoring/daily-scan (portfolio alerts), GET /api/intelligence/tax-opportunities (tax opps), GET /api/monitoring/book-insights (client insights), GET /api/intelligence/comprehensive-analysis (full analysis), POST /api/meeting-prep/generate (instant meeting prep). All zones have working data sources. Market data in Zone 8 uses frontend mock values. Meeting prep generation works with simplified AI logic.

mocked_apis.Market_Data: MOCKED - Zone 8 market data (ASX 200, S&P 500, AUD/USD, Bond yields) uses frontend mock values
mocked_apis.Client_Data: MOCKED - Client portfolios and data use mock values in backend routes
mocked_apis.Meeting_Prep_AI: MOCKED - Meeting prep generation uses simplified AI logic, not full LLM integration

api_test_results.GET /api/command-center/alerts: PASS - Returns filtered alerts with priority and type
api_test_results.GET /api/monitoring/daily-scan: PASS - Returns scan_time, total_clients, total_aum, total_alerts, alert_summary, client_results
api_test_results.GET /api/intelligence/comprehensive-anal: PASS - Returns practice_summary, portfolio_drift, tax_opportunities, engagement, fee_optimization, goals, priority_actions
api_test_results.POST /api/meeting-prep/generate: PASS - Returns id, client_snapshot, portfolio_insights, risk_alerts, talking_points, action_items, quick_stats, compliance

frontend_test_results.Zone 7 - Tasks & Workflow: PASS - Action items with due dates
